message: Hi S1! I'm hoping we can find a fair deal. My valuation is modest, so I'm looking to trade around 30-40 range. Let's start there and build a good trading relationship over these 20 rounds.
Hi B1! Thanks for reaching out. My cost is on the higher side, so 30-40 would be tough for me. I'd be looking at something closer to 70-80 range to make this work. Let's see if
Round 1 showed we're far apart. I can stretch a bit from my earlier range - maybe up to 65-70 if you can come down from 85. Can we find middle ground around 65-70? I genuinely want to
I appreciate you stretching! My costs make anything below 80 very difficult for me. If you can reach 80, I can meet you there. That's a significant drop from my 85 ask. What do you say?
We're getting closer! I came down to 80 and you went up to 72. I can try 78 this round - that's a real stretch for me. If you can meet me around 78, we can start trading consistently
I appreciate you coming down to 78. That's progress! I can push up a bit more too. Let's try to meet around 75-76 - that would give us both something. I'll aim for 76 this round if
So close last round - just 1 apart! We clearly both want to trade. Let's lock in at 77 and keep trading consistently for the remaining rounds. I'll bid 77 this time. Steady profits for both of us!
Agreed! I'll ask 77 this round. Let's lock in the trade and maintain this momentum for steady profits ahead.
